greetings.cold: Mr. Gibbons. The shears are working; I'd keep questions short.
greetings.neutral: Mr. Gibbons. Careful of the stems.
greetings.warm: Gary. Hold these a moment — there. Now you're useful and I'm listening.

etiquette.note: Calm and wry, paws always in stems. One ivy sprig behind an ear, always.
